transcript:
CALLER: Good morning. I'd like to reschedule. I booked a neurology appointment for next Monday but I have an exam that day now.
AGENT: Good morning! No problem. Name and registered number?
CALLER: Shruti Kulkarni. 9823112244.
AGENT: Found it — Shruti Kulkarni, Monday 11 AM with Dr. Leena Verma. Best of luck with your exam! When would you like to reschedule?
CALLER: Maybe the following week? Wednesday or Thursday?
AGENT: Dr. Verma has Wednesday at 2 PM and Thursday at 4 PM available the following week.
CALLER: Wednesday 2 PM please.
AGENT: All set! Rescheduled to the following Wednesday at 2 PM. SMS coming your way. Good luck again!
CALLER: Thank you so much!
